title: CivicSuite/civicsuite

summary: A full-featured, hackable SvelteKit AI chatbot built by Vercel

title: 0xra0/bethesda-strings-editor

title: oib/AITBC
summary: AITBC - AI Trusted Blockchain Computing Platform A comprehensive blockchain-based marketplace for AI computing services with zero-knowledge proof verification and confidential transaction support.

title: MelonS/MelonS-Agents
summary: macOS multi-agent scaffold. Current mission: faceless short-form video (topic → 9:16 60s, $0 runtime, EN+KO). General-purpose: orchestrator + 4 subagents + 3-layer reactive audit + Tier-1/Tier-2 routing. More mission types planned.

title: 75zch5j9nz-hue/it-status-center
summary: Homelab IT Status Dashboard — real-time monitoring, 22 AI agents, 5 multi-agent workflows, VAG car market intelligence. FastAPI + SSE + Docker Compose.

title: goweft/cas
summary: CAS — Conversational Agent Shell (Go). Single binary TUI: conversation generates workspaces, you control them directly.

title: hnshah/verdict
summary: LLM eval framework. Compare any model via OpenAI-compatible API.

title: elbruno/openclawnet
summary: 🐾 OpenClawNet — Build an AI Agent Platform in .NET 10 (Reactor live series materials)

title: Oolab-labs/patchwork-os
summary: personal AI runtime, local-first. MCP bridge giving Claude Code 170+ tools (LSP, debugger, terminal, git) inside VS Code, Cursor, Windsurf, or JetBrains. Optional Patchwork layer adds YAML recipes, an approval queue, and an oversight dashboard. Your models, your machine, your policy. (Mac & Windows)

title: MuhammadUsmanGM/code-stick
summary: Plug in a USB. Get an offline AI coding agent on any laptop - Windows, macOS, Linux. opencode + Ollama, pre-built for 5 targets, zero install on the host.

title: marvelousempire/yousirjuan
summary: You-Sir Juan™ OS — sovereign private AI operating system for families and family offices. Associate Agents, voice-first, biometric auth, RealityKit 4 iOS kiosk, web interface, on-device Ollama. Yours to train.

title: Navibyte-Innovations-Pvt-Ltd/gai-tools
summary: AI-powered git auto-commit for macOS — stage files, they commit themselves using local Ollama

title: 1Panel-dev/1Panel
summary: 🔥 1Panel is a modern, open-source VPS control panel — and the only one with native AI agent support. Run Ollama models, deploy OpenClaw agents, and manage your entire server stack from one clean web interface.

title: Josiahxix957/1.0claude-kimi-cloud-workspace
summary: Deploy a web-based chat interface for Kimi K2.6 using a Docker container on Hugging Face.
